---
title: "R for Lifestyle and Brain Health"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="container">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div class="hero">
    <img src="https://www.r-project.org/Rlogo.png" style="width: 100px;" alt="R logo">
    <div>
      <h1>R for<br>Lifestyle and<br>Brain Health</h1>
      <p>Build R programming skills to support research.</p>
    </div>
    <img src="https://github.com/bhelsel/RLAB/raw/main/man/figures/RLAB.png" style="width: 150px;" alt="RLAB logo">
  </div>

  <!-- DATE BAR -->
  <div class="date-bar">
    <strong>STARTS JUNE 24!</strong>
    <span>Hands-on journey into R for data science and advanced programming.</span>
  </div>

  <!-- WHAT WE'LL COVER -->
  <div class="section-title">WHAT WE'LL COVER</div>

  <div class="grid-2">

    <div class="card">
      <h3>R for Data Science</h3>
      <p>Build skills to wrangle, visualize, and model data.</p>
      <div class="bullet">📊 Import and transform data</div>
      <div class="bullet">📈 Visualize data with ggplot2</div>
      <div class="bullet">🧠 Write and use your own functions</div>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <h3>Advanced R</h3>
      <p>Take your R skills to the next level.</p>
      <div class="bullet">⚙️ Object-Oriented Programming</div>
      <div class="bullet">🧩 Metaprogramming</div>
      <div class="bullet">🚀 Improving Code Performance</div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- WHY / OUTCOMES -->
  <div class="grid-2 alt">

    <div class="card">
      <h3>Why this course?</h3>
      <ul class="checklist">
        <li>Connects early-career researchers</li>
        <li>Bridges data &amp; domain expertise</li>
        <li>Build practical, career-advancing skills</li>
        <li>Advances research software development</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <h3>You'll walk away with:</h3>
      <ul class="checklist">
        <li>Strong programming skills in R</li>
        <li>Ability to develop new research tools</li>
        <li>Skills to build reproducible workflows</li>
        <li>Confidence using R to support research</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <div class="footer">
    <span>Connect with other scientists interested in learning R to support lifestyle and brain health research.</span>
  </div>

</div>
```
